01 — The Artist

Faith, fangs & fine
black ink.

Joshua Acosta works out of a high-rise studio overlooking Dallas — a hand built for black-and-grey realism, religious iconography, and illustrative work that walks the line between sacred and street.

Lions with crowns. Christ in thorns. Praying hands wrapped in rosaries. Anime heroes mid-cataclysm. The work shifts in subject but stays consistent in obsession: clean linework, brutal contrast, and shading deep enough to make the skin look carved.

Every piece is custom. Every consult is a conversation. Nothing leaves the studio that doesn't earn its place.

Black & Grey Realism Religious Illustrative Anime Cover-ups
10+ Years / Custom only

03 — The Craft

What gets done.

/ 001

Custom Design

Built from scratch — your reference, my drawing hand. Religious, realism, anime, or anywhere in between. We talk, I sketch, we refine, then we make it permanent.

FROM $250 / HR — 2HR MIN
/ 002

Full Sleeves

Long-form projects planned across multiple sessions. Saints, beasts, characters, scenery — composed to flow with the body, not fight it.

DEPOSIT $500 — BY CONSULT
/ 003

Cover Ups

Old regrets become new statements. Bold, intentional transformations that swallow what came before — usually heavy in black and grey.

CONSULTATION REQUIRED

05 — The Process

From idea to ink.

01

The Inquiry

Text (214) 422-1039 with references, placement, and rough size. The more honest the brief, the better the build.

02

The Consult

We talk. About the piece, your skin, your timeline. Deposit locks the date.

03

The Draw

Custom drawing built for your body. One round of refinements before the needle.

04

The Session

Studio is private, comfortable, and clean. Bring snacks, music, and patience.

06 — The Word

Worn for life.
